reviews.comment:
No me aplicaron el descuento de socio al cargar nafta. Muy mala la atención del playero. Prepotente. Le mostré el carnet antes de que cargue ni lo miro y después dijo que si no había tomado el descuento no era problema suyo, que me arregle por teléfono llamando a ACA. Fue el jueves 8 a las 6.50am

(Translated by Google)
They didn't apply my member discount when I filled up with gas. The attendant's service was terrible. He was arrogant. I showed him my membership card before I filled up, but he didn't even look at it and then said that if I hadn't received the discount, it wasn't his problem, and that I should sort it out by calling ACA. This happened on Thursday the 8th at 6:50 am.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLb2QtOTNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Peor eatacion de servicio que conozco. Lamentablemente es la unica cerca de mi casa.
Siempre hay demora.
Los playeros lo unico que les interesa es limpiarte el vidrio para que le tiren un manfo.
DESASTRE!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Worst gas station I've ever been to. Unfortunately, it's the only one near my house.
There's always a delay.
All the attendants care about is cleaning your windshield so you'll give them a tip.
A DISASTER!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLd2Z1LUhnEAE
